pr_text:
## Title: Clear stale protocol state in NR DL-SCH layer demapping

### Summary
The NR downlink shared channel (DL-SCH) demodulation module had a bug where LLR (Log-Likelihood Ratio) buffers retained stale data from previous procedure calls. This occurred because the `layer_llr` pointer array was not initialized to NULL, and the `nr_dlsch_layer_demapping` function did not clear buffers when codewords were absent (marked by `codeword_TB0/1 == -1`). This stale state could cause incorrect demodulati
